title: MVS Pruned Node Set
description: Output of the pruner (Phase 3): the node ids amputated from a grammar and a reference to the surviving minified standard. Input to the reference-parser code generator (Phase 4).

threshold.description: The MIN_USAGE_PERCENTAGE applied (usage fraction, 0..1). Nodes below this and not protected were pruned.

pruned.description: Node ids removed from the standard.

surviving_grammar.description: Path/URI of the minified standard containing only surviving nodes (e.g. the generated mvs.abnf / mvs.asn1).
